description:
Analyze the 'wedding_cohort.csv' dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\OutbreakData\wedding_cohort.csv) in Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis to identify the outbreak source. The dataset includes five food exposures (Chicken, Salad, Cake, Water, IceCream) and an outcome variable 'Ill' (1=Yes, 0=No). Determine the food item with the highest statistically significant Risk Ratio using cohort analysis. Save the results to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\OutbreakData\culprit_report.txt using the following format:

Culprit: [FoodName]
RiskRatio: [Value]
